name: Smith Ranch
description: 3 miles of private spring creek with consistent hatches and healthy wild trout population.
regulations: Catch and release only. Barbless hooks required. No wading in spawning areas Oct-Dec.
access_notes: Gate code required. Call landowner 24hrs before arrival.

name: Big Bend River Access
description: Scenic stretch of tailwater below the dam with excellent nymph fishing year-round.
regulations: Artificial flies only. Single barbless hooks.
access_notes: Park at gravel pullout on River Road. Walk 0.25 miles to access point.

name: Mountain Lake Lodge
description: 50-acre private lake stocked annually. Float tubes and small watercraft welcome.
regulations: Catch and release for cutthroat. 2 fish limit on rainbow/brook.
access_notes: Lodge check-in required. Boats available on-site.
